Case Study • Various

How we helped PK Enterprises Earns EcoVadis Gold Medal, Ranking Among the Top 5% of Companies Worldwide

The Challenge

Detailed inside.

Our Solution

Detailed inside.

The Results

Detailed inside.

PK Enterprises, a leader in world-class high-fashion garments and textile products, has reached a milestone that many organizations strive for over years of dedicated effort. In 2026, the company was awarded the prestigious EcoVadis Gold Medal—a distinction achieved by less than 5% of the more than 150,000+ companies evaluated globally.

This remarkable accomplishment places PK Enterprises among the top 5% of companies globally, with an EcoVadis score of 82, demonstrating leadership in transparency, accountability, and responsible business practices in the garment and textile industry.

The achievement reflects PK Enterprises’ early strategic vision, disciplined execution, and genuine commitment to embedding sustainability at the core of its operations. By integrating ESG principles into every aspect of its business, PK Enterprises continues to raise the bar for responsible innovation and sustainable excellence across the global textile value chain.

Outstanding Performance Across All Sustainability Pillars

PK Enterprises delivered exceptional scores across all four EcoVadis assessment pillars:

  • 🌿 Environment: 81/100
  • 👥 Labor & Human Rights:   84/100
  • ⚖️ Ethics: 79/100
  • 🔗 Sustainable Procurement: 81/100

📊 Overall Score: 82 / 100
🏅 Global Percentile Ranking: 97th (Top 5% Worldwide)

This achievement is particularly significant for a company operating in the textile sector, where sustainability leadership requires innovation not just in products, but across the entire value chain — from responsible material sourcing to garment manufacturing and end-of-life considerations.

The Strategic Partnership Behind the Success

PK Enterprises’ historic achievement was made possible through its strategic collaboration with Growlity Private Ltd, a premier ESG and sustainability consulting firm with proven expertise in guiding organizations to global ESG excellence.

The partnership exemplified how strategic ESG advisory, combined with organizational commitment, can accelerate sustainability maturity and achieve world-class recognition.

What Makes This Achievement Extraordinary

Achieving EcoVadis Gold in the Textile industry represents:

✨ Immediate Global Recognition: Instant positioning among the world’s top  sustainable companies

💡 Strategic Foresight: Proactive integration of ESG excellence into business strategy from day one

🎯 Competitive Advantage: Differentiation in markets where sustainability credentials drive business opportunities

 🌏 Regional Leadership: Setting new standards for the Indian Textile industry

Leadership Perspectives

Message from Mr. Rishidev Sadh

Earning the EcoVadis Gold Medal marks an important achievement for PK Enterprises. It validates our approach of combining innovation and performance with responsible business practices that prioritize people and the environment. Sustainability is integral to our operations and partnerships across India, and this recognition strengthens our resolve to continuously improve.

We sincerely thank Growlity for their support in turning our sustainability goals into clear and measurable results.

Director, PK Enterprises

Message from Dr. Nitin Dumasia

PK Enterprises’ achievement of the EcoVadis Gold Medal is truly extraordinary. This outcome reflects exceptional leadership commitment, operational excellence, and a genuine understanding that sustainability is not an afterthought but a core business imperative.
Working with PK Enterprises has been inspiring — their team demonstrated remarkable agility, transparency, and dedication to building ESG excellence into their organizational fabric. They have set a powerful example for companies across India and beyond.

President & CEO, Growlity Private Limited

About PK Enterprises

PK Enterprises is India’s premier provider of innovative and high-fashion garments and textile products.  Enabling it to create apparel that meets domestic and international market requirements. The company’s vision extends beyond delivering products — it aims to shape the future of Indian workspaces by creating environments that inspire collaboration, productivity, and growth while upholding the highest standards of environmental and social responsibility.

About Growlity Private Ltd

Growlity is a leading ESG and sustainability consulting firm dedicated to helping organizations achieve measurable and credible sustainability outcomes. With deep expertise in EcoVadis assessments, ESG strategy development, sustainability reporting, climate action, and supply chain sustainability, Growlity empowers businesses to translate their sustainability vision into actionable performance.
